allow: PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 1420 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue -InformationLevel Quiet\){$ok=$true;break} }; Write-Output \("vite up: " + $ok\); if\($ok\){ $app = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:1420/src/App.tsx" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output \("App.tsx references AnnotationBar: " + \($app -match 'AnnotationBar'\)\); $bar = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:1420/src/components/AnnotationBar.tsx" -UseBasicParsing\); Write-Output \("AnnotationBar.tsx served, status " + $bar.StatusCode + ", length " + $bar.Content.Length\) })

PowerShell($ok = Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 1420 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue -InformationLevel Quiet; Write-Output \("vite up: " + $ok\); if\($ok\){ $app = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:1420/src/App.tsx" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output \("App references AnnotationBar: " + [bool]\($app -match 'AnnotationBar'\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $app = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:1420/src/App.tsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8\).Content; Write-Output \("App.tsx served by dev server. Contains AnnotationBar import: " + [bool]\($app -match 'AnnotationBar'\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("fetch failed: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
